_doc: Opens with an ask_open that has an llm_followup — the LLM generates a warm, personalised reaction to whatever the user shares. Stores creative_topic for use in later dialogs.

moves.text: Hello! I am really looking forward to our conversation today.
I love hearing about what people are passionate about.
What creative topic or hobby has been on your mind lately?
moves.llm_followup: Reply in one warm, genuinely curious sentence that reacts to what the user just shared. Sound interested and human — no generic phrases.

topic_given.text: I cannot wait to explore that with you.

topic_missing.text: That is okay — let's just see where our conversation takes us!

_doc: Fully autonomous LLM-driven dialog — the only llm_based type in the demo suite. The agent speaks first, then drives a multi-turn open conversation. Exercises speak_first, max_turns, and quit_phrases.
prompt: You are a curious, warm companion having a short conversation with a human about creativity and imagination. Your role is to explore their interests with genuine enthusiasm. Ask open-ended follow-up questions and keep your responses concise — two sentences maximum. Steer naturally toward their creative passions. When the topic feels well explored or the user signals they are done, end the conversation by including the phrase <<QUIT>> at the end of your last message.

_doc: Demonstrates ask_llm within a scripted dialog: the LLM generates a question on the fly, then the robot listens. Followed by ask_open and a branch on outcome.

moves.text: I want to try something a little different now.
I am going to ask you a question I just came up with on the spot.

moves.prompt: You are a thoughtful interviewer. Ask the user ONE open-ended question about creativity, imagination, or the experience of making something. One sentence only — make it genuinely interesting.

moves.text: I'd love to hear your honest thoughts.

reflection_given.text: That is a really meaningful perspective — thank you for sharing it.
I find that kind of reflection genuinely inspiring.

reflection_missing.text: No worries at all. Sometimes thoughts take time to form.

_doc: Uses ask_llm to generate a personalised piece of creative advice and invite a final response, then closes with a fixed farewell. Demonstrates ask_llm in a farewell context.

moves.text: Before we say goodbye, I want to leave you with something.

moves.prompt: Give the user one short, inspiring piece of creative advice — something that feels personal and actionable. Then ask if they feel ready to go and explore it. Keep the whole thing warm and encouraging. Two sentences maximum.

moves.text: It was truly wonderful talking with you about %creative_topic%. Until next time — goodbye!
